message: fix: gate settings auto-open on stored tokens

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
 - Add swift-log integration with OSLog + optional file logging sink.
 - Add debug logging settings (verbosity + file logging) for macOS and iOS.
 - Fix contribution header heatmap sizing on first launch/loading.
+- Fix auto-opening settings when tokens already exist.
 
 ## 0.1.1 - 2025-12-31

@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ import RepoBarCore
 @Observable
 final class Session {
     var account: AccountState = .loggedOut
+    var hasStoredTokens = false
     var repositories: [Repository] = []
     var menuSnapshot: MenuSnapshot?
     var menuDisplayIndex: [String: RepositoryDisplayModel] = [:]
